definition: of yesterday , τὸ χθιζὸν χρεῖος their yesterday's  debt, (Iliad by Homer); ὁ χθ. πόνος yesterday's  labour, (Herdotus Historicus); in adverbial sense, with Verbs, χθιζὸς ἔβη he went yesterday , (Iliad by Homer); χθ. ἤλυθες (Odyssey by Homer), etc.:—;neuter χθιζόν as adverb = χθές, (Homer); so plural χθιζά, see. πρώιζος. (ML)
